label: ARD dioxygenase (AIZE)
protein_description: 1,2-dihydroxy-3-keto-5-methylthiopentene dioxygenase; Catalyzes the formation of formate and 2-keto-4- methylthiobutyrate (KMTB) from 1,2-dihydroxy-3-keto-5-methylthiopentene (DHK-MTPene).

label: SAM synthase
protein_description: S-adenosylmethionine synthase; Catalyzes the formation of S-adenosylmethionine from methionine and ATP.
